data.title: Rachel Platten headlines Susan G. Komen® Party in Pink Gala on 10th anniversary of "Fight Song." Event in NYC on Oct 8.
data.description: A Grammy-winning singer-songwriter, Rachel Platten, is set to perform at the Susan G. Komen® Party in Pink gala in New York City on October 8. This event, which marks the start of National Breast Cancer Awareness Month, will also celebrate the tenth anniversary of Platten's empowering anthem, “Fight Song.” Platten will use her voice to support the millions impacted by breast cancer and those fighting against it. Kathy Sutherland expressed excitement about having Rachel join the event.

data.title: Tech earnings and AI boost propel U.S. stocks to record highs. Fed rate cuts expected due to soft labor data and stable inflation. Market yielding and volatility ease.
data.description: Record-high levels were reached in U.S. equities due to positive tech earnings and optimism surrounding AI. Additionally, soft labor data and consistent inflation rates are increasing expectations of rate cuts by the Fed, leading to lower yields and reduced volatility in the market.

data.title: New OpenAI data reveals Claude and GPT-5 approaching human skill levels, with models improving by 300% in 15 months. Will AI replace jobs soon?
data.description: A recent study by OpenAI revealed that the models Claude and GPT-5 have reached a significant milestone by successfully matching the performance of human experts in real work tasks. What is even more astonishing is that these models have shown a remarkable improvement of 300% over a period of just 15 months.

data.title: Accenture's Q4 2025 results beat expectations, with earnings of $3.03 per share and sales of $17.60 billion. Fiscal 2026 projected sales are $71.07 billion-$73.16 billion, EPS of $13.19-$13.57, and adjusted EPS of $13.52-$13.90. Q1 2026 sales are expected to be $18.10 billion-$18.75 billion. Analysts lowered forecasts.
data.description: Accenture plc (NYSE: ACN) reported impressive fourth-quarter 2025 results, surpassing expectations with earnings of $3.03 per share compared to the anticipated $2.96. Sales also exceeded projections, reaching $17.60 billion against the estimated $17.36 billion. Looking ahead to fiscal 2026, Accenture anticipates sales between $71.07 billion and $73.16 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of $69.43 billion. The company foresees a GAAP EPS for the fiscal year of $13.19 to $13.57, surpassing the analyst consensus of $12.88. Adjusted EPS is projected to be $13.52 to $13.90. For the first quarter of 2026, Accenture expects sales to be within $18.10 billion and $18.75 billion, compared to the analyst estimate of $18.451 billion. Additionally, the company plans to distribute at least $9.3 billion in cash to shareholders.
Citi expects tariffs to increasingly bite.

data.title: Perimeter Security Partners acquired Shore Systems and Shore Technology Group on August 27th, 2025.
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, on September 26, 2025, Perimeter Security Partners (PSP) completed the acquisition of Shore Systems, Inc. and Shore Technology Group, Inc. commonly referred to as "Shore". Established by Chris Guido in 1996 in Long Island, New York, Shore is known for its expertise in installation and continuous support of security systems. The acquisition brings together PSP's resources and Shore's experience to strengthen their market presence.

data.title: "Hint Summit 2025 highlights record employer adoption, announces 10th anniversary event in Nashville. DENVER, Sept. 26, 2025."
data.description: The yearly Direct Primary Care conference organized by Hint Health highlights a surge in employer adoption rates, pointing towards significant growth. The event also lays the groundwork for the upcoming 10th-anniversary celebration in Nashville. Taking place in Denver on September 26, 2025, the conference emphasizes the increasing traction of Direct Primary Care among employers, showcasing record-breaking numbers. With the aim of promoting the advancement and prosperity of Direct Primary Care, Hint Health leads the way as a prominent player in the digital health sector.

data.title: 2026 scholarship application for Future of STEM Scholars Initiative (FOSSI) at HBCU Week Fair in Delaware. 6th year.
data.description: In Wilmington, North Carolina on September 26, 2025, the Future of STEM Scholars Initiative (FOSSI) commenced its 2026 scholarship application window at the HBCU Week Foundation College Fair. This event in Wilmington, Delaware signifies the sixth year in a row that FOSSI has participated in the fair.

data.title: Havis to exhibit public safety solutions at IACP 2025, boasting over 80 years of leadership in the industry.
data.description: Explore firsthand how Havis Solutions enhance mobility, connectivity, and efficiency for today's public safety professionals in Warminster, Pennsylvania. With a legacy spanning over 80 years, Havis is the premier provider of public safety solutions, with a strong reputation among law enforcement agencies nationwide. Visit to witness how their innovative products are optimizing operations and maximizing efficiency.

data.title: Backyards transformed by motorized pergolas in Englewood, Colo. as social hubs; family retreats with wellness sanctuaries.
data.description: In Englewood, Colorado, as of September 26, 2025, a significant shift is underway in the American backyard concept. Gone are the days of simple lawns and patios, as they are now evolving into multifunctional spaces serving as social gathering spots, family getaways, and wellness havens. At the forefront of this revolution is the motorized pergola, a versatile structure that offers adaptability and style. This trend underscores the changing landscape of outdoor living, emphasizing the importance of creating personalized and functional outdoor environments.

data.title: Susan G. Komen® hosts MORE THAN PINK Walk in Los Angeles in 2025, aiming to raise $600K for breast cancer research.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Susan G. Komen®, the top breast cancer organization, will host the 2025 Los Angeles MORE THAN PINK Walk, bringing together breast cancer survivors, individuals with metastatic breast cancer (MBC), and supporters. The event's goal is to raise $600,000 to support Komen's vital work nationwide. This gathering serves to unite the community and generate crucial funds for Komen's lifesaving initiatives and research efforts.
